name: Yoshi
description: Nintendo's Mario-adjacent series starring Yoshi, covering puzzle games, platformers, and craft-style adventures.

eras.title: Puzzle and Island Era
eras.description: Yoshi moves from Mario supporting character into puzzle games and the Yoshi's Island platforming identity.

eras.title: Craft Platformer Era
eras.description: Modern Yoshi games emphasize soft craft aesthetics, collectibles, and accessible platforming.
